eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Boundary, ID; at 9:18 PM on JUL 15, 2026 Effective until 1:18 AM JUL 16, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The Boundary county Sheriff's Office has issued an immediate wildfire evacuation order for the following areas. Turner's Hill Road from the 3000 block to highway 95 and Any address on Holmes Rd. in Bonner's Ferry. Contact Boundary County Sheriff's Office for further information.
